summary: Matched a batch of miscellaneous lb library functions, mostly in lbcollision.c plus lb_00B0.c. The PR turned lb_00B0.c on as Matching, matched quaternion interpolation helpers lb_8000C490 and lb_8000C868, implemented/refactored several lbcollision routines, cleaned up HitCapsule bitfields and GXColor typing, and renamed the lbcoll-local JObj setup symbol back to weak HSD_JObjSetupMatrix. The decomp.dev report credited 8 new matches and +3732 matched bytes, with lbcollision functions lbColl_80008820, lbColl_80008248, lbColl_80005EBC, lbColl_80005FC0, lbColl_80008688, lbColl_8000805C and lb_00B0 functions lb_8000C868/lb_8000C490 reaching 100%.

key_files.reason: Largest change; refactored and matched multiple collision helpers, victim tracking routines, JObj matrix usage, GXColor typing, and geometric projection/distance code.
Matched quaternion/SRT interpolation routines lb_8000C490 and lb_8000C868 by reorganizing locals, using SQ expressions, epsilon comparisons, and proper Quaternion temporaries.
Adjusted HitCapsule bitfield packing from many u8 one-bit fields to a u16 layout with x40_b4 as an 8-bit field, and documented x44/x45 as victims_1/victims_2 counts.
Updated prototypes for const Vec3 inputs, GXColor pointer parameters, and named victim/type arguments.
Removed the temporary lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix declaration/workaround and restored HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr to call HSD_JObjSetupMatrix.
Renamed lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix at 0x80007D68 to HSD_JObjSetupMatrix and changed scope to weak.
Changed melee/lb/lb_00B0.c from NonMatching to Matching.

what_changed: configure.py now builds melee/lb/lb_00B0.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt renamed lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix to HSD_JObjSetupMatrix at .text:0x80007D68 and marked it weak rather than global.
src/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.h removed the temporary comment/declaration for lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix and changed HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr to call HSD_JObjSetupMatrix directly.

src/melee/lb/lb_00B0.c matched lb_8000C490 and lb_8000C868 by restructuring quaternion sum/difference calculations, using SQ(), adding Quaternion sum/dif locals, changing small-angle comparisons to 1e-4F, and removing unnecessary casts to Quaternion*.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c changed lbColl_80005C44 to return bool with const Vec3 inputs, added vector_sub, between, and nearzero helpers, and rewrote the capsule/point test around Vec3 deltas, dot products, scale clamping, and early bounding checks.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c rewrote lbColl_80005EBC and lbColl_80005FC0 as clearer segment projection distance routines using copied Vec3 stack locals, dot products, scale clamping, and explicit x/y/z distance terms.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c improved lbColl_800077A0 by flattening nested scopes, naming diff_cb/diff_ba/normal vectors and scalar terms, using nearzero for degenerate vector tests, and moving locals to match code generation.
src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c removed fake HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr/HSD_JObjGetMtx helpers and the local lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix inline-copy workaround; callers now use HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c implemented lbColl_80008248 instead of NOT_IMPLEMENTED, updating hurt capsule positions, optionally forcing z from arg5, selecting/concatenating a matrix, choosing scale from x43_b1, and calling lbColl_80006E58.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c rewrote lbColl_80008688 and added/matched lbColl_80008820 as victim-list insertion/update routines using ARRAY_SIZE loops, type-based switch cases, and circular x44/x45 count updates.
src/melee/lb/types.h repacked HitCapsule fields at +0x40/+0x41 into u16 bitfields, especially x40_b4 as an 8-bit field used by victim x4 updates.

src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c and lbcollision.h replaced several UNK_T/u8*/void* color-like uses with GXColor or GXColor*, including lbColl_804D36D0, lbColl_804D36E4, lbColl_803B9928 pad_x, and lbColl_800096B4 arguments.
The decomp.dev bot reported 8 new matches: lbColl_80008820, lbColl_80008248, lb_8000C868, lbColl_80005EBC, lbColl_80005FC0, lbColl_80008688, lb_8000C490, and lbColl_8000805C.
smart_moves: Once the lbcoll JObj matrix code matched, the PR removed the project-local duplicate/fake lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix path and restored the canonical HSD_JObjSetupMatrix weak symbol, reducing special-case header debt.
Quaternion interpolation was expressed as squared component sums and squared component differences via SQ(), making the sign-flip test readable while matching the expected evaluation pattern.

The collision distance routines were converted from many scalar temporaries and nested scopes into Vec3 copies/deltas plus dot products; this both documents the projection math and produced matches for lbColl_80005EBC/lbColl_80005FC0.

Victim tracking was simplified from pointer/offset-heavy decompiler output into ARRAY_SIZE loops and switch cases over hit type, which revealed the semantics of x44/x45 as circular victim-list counts.
Typing color data as GXColor/GXColor* removed UNK_T casts and allowed call sites to pass addresses naturally, improving headers and future reverse-engineering readability.
Changing input Vec3 parameters to const where the code only reads them captured real constness without inventing broader behavior.
decomp_lessons: When a function was temporarily named after the only object file that kept it, revisit the symbol after matching: lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix could be restored to the library name HSD_JObjSetupMatrix with weak linkage.
Bitfield packing can be decisive for matching and semantics. Here, collapsing +0x40/+0x41 HitCapsule flags into u16 bitfields exposed x40_b4 as the value copied into victim entries.
For geometric collision code, expressing segment projection as d1_dot_d1, d1_dot_d2, scale clamp, and squared distance can match better than preserving decompiler scalar noise.
Small epsilon literals matter. lb_8000C868 used 1e-4F for near-equal Euler rotations, while lbcollision introduced 1e-5F-style nearzero/between helpers for degenerate geometry checks.
Removing fake inline wrappers can be a matching tactic only after the underlying real symbol/linkage is fixed; otherwise symbol renames can cause diff tooling failures.
Use domain types as soon as evidence supports them. GXColor replacements in lbcollision improved function prototypes and eliminated ambiguous u8*/void*/UNK_T parameters.

Bot match reports are useful evidence for prioritizing follow-up: this PR improved lbColl_800077A0 to 96.28% but did not fully match it, suggesting the remaining mismatch is likely local expression/codegen detail rather than missing high-level structure.
naming_conventions: Canonical baselib symbol name is HSD_JObjSetupMatrix, not lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix; the symbol is weak at 0x80007D68.
Use HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr rather than local fake variants such as HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr_fake in lbcollision.
Name HitCapsule victim-list helper parameters by role when known: capsule, type, victim.
Use x44 and x45 comments as victims_1 count and victims_2 count based on this PR's evidence.
Use GXColor/GXColor* for lbcollision color data and arguments instead of UNK_T, void*, or u8* when the data is color-like.
Helper names introduced in lbcollision include vector_sub, between, nearzero, sqrDistance, and getHit1C; evidence for intended final naming quality is limited because some are still generic/inferred.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Moved local declarations in lb_8000C868 so Vec3 and Quaternion stack objects appear before scalar temporaries, matching stack/codegen ordering.
Used SQ(expr) directly on quaternion component sums/differences, then summed components in the desired order for branch comparison.
Replaced comparisons against broad literal 1 with 1e-4F in lb_8000C868's rotation-difference fast path.
Introduced explicit Quaternion sum and dif temporaries before calling HSD_QuatLib_8037EF28, avoiding casts such as (Quaternion*) &sp94.
Flattened decompiler-created nested blocks in lbcollision geometry code while preserving temporary Vec3 stack copies like sp50, sp38, sp70, sp64, and sp34 where needed for codegen.
Used direct 0.5F and 5.0f literals in lbColl_8000805C instead of an indirect float constant for midpoint/collision distance behavior.
Changed bit tests from raw shifts such as ((u8) arg0->x43 >> 6U) & 1 to named bitfield access arg0->x43_b1.
Replaced pointer-stride victim-list traversal with ARRAY_SIZE loops and switch statements, which still matched lbColl_80008688 and lbColl_80008820.
Set HSD_JObjSetupMatrix symbol scope to weak to reflect linker deduplication and allow HSD_JObjGetMtxPtr to use the canonical function name.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported +0.10% matched code and +3732 matched bytes for GALE01, with 8 new function matches and 3 unmatched-function improvements.
New matches listed were lbColl_80008820, lbColl_80008248, lb_8000C868, lbColl_80005EBC, lbColl_80005FC0, lbColl_80008688, lb_8000C490, and lbColl_8000805C.
Author noted that diff display/checking was failing because of the lbColl_JObjSetupMatrix to HSD_JObjSetupMatrix rename.
No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: lbColl_800077A0 remaining mismatch 96.28 nearzero quadratic scl
